description: Phase 79: Create @quant/creator-economy package for UGC monetization - tips, paid apps, IAP, ad revshare, remix royalties, creator dashboard, payouts, tiers, brand partnerships, and Quant Credits as in-ecosystem currency.
steps: Create packages/creator-economy/ with package.json (name: @quant/creator-economy, deps: zod, pino, @quant/common workspace:*), tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json

Create src/types.ts with types: CreatorProfile (id, userId, tier, earnings, payoutInfo, verified, createdAt), MonetizationEvent (id, type: 'tip'|'iap'|'ad_revenue'|'subscription'|'remix_royalty', amount, currency, creatorId, sourceId, timestamp), CreatorTier ('free'|'starter'|'pro'|'enterprise'), PayoutRequest (id, creatorId, amount, method, status, requestedAt), BrandPartnership (id, creatorId, brandId, terms, status, dealValue, startDate, endDate), AdRevenueShare (creatorShare, platformShare, adId, impressions, earnings), RemixRoyalty (originalCreatorId, remixerId, originalContentId, remixContentId, royaltyPercent, earned)

Create src/monetization/monetization-engine.ts with MonetizationEngine class: recordTip(fromUser, toCreator, amount), recordIAP(userId, creatorId, itemId, price), recordAdRevenue(creatorId, adId, impressions, cpm), recordRemixRoyalty(originalCreator, remixer, contentId, amount), getEarnings(creatorId, period). Central orchestrator for all monetization types.

Create src/monetization/remix-royalty-tracker.ts with RemixRoyaltyTracker class: registerOriginal(contentId, creatorId, royaltyPercent), recordRemix(remixId, originalContentId, remixerId), calculateRoyalties(period), getChain(contentId). Tracks remix lineage and splits.

Create src/dashboard/dashboard-service.ts with CreatorDashboardService class: getOverview(creatorId), getEarningsBreakdown(creatorId, period), getTopContent(creatorId, limit), getAudienceStats(creatorId), getPayoutHistory(creatorId). Analytics and earnings breakdown.

Create src/payouts/payout-service.ts with PayoutService class: requestPayout(creatorId, amount, method), processPayout(payoutId), getPayoutStatus(payoutId), getPayoutHistory(creatorId), calculateAvailableBalance(creatorId). Connect to payments concepts.
Create src/payouts/tax-reporting.ts with TaxReportingService class: generate1099(creatorId, year), getYearlyEarnings(creatorId, year), getWithholdingStatus(creatorId). Tax document generation.

Create src/tiers/tier-service.ts with TierService class: getTier(creatorId), upgradeTier(creatorId, newTier), downgradeTier(creatorId), getTierBenefits(tier), checkEligibility(creatorId, tier). Free/starter/pro/enterprise tier management.

Create src/brand-partnerships/partnership-service.ts with BrandPartnershipService class: createListing(creatorId, requirements), matchCreators(brandId, criteria), proposeDeal(brandId, creatorId, terms), acceptDeal(partnershipId), getActiveDeals(creatorId). Brand partnership matching.

Create src/credits/quant-credits.ts with QuantCreditsService class: getBalance(userId), earnCredits(userId, amount, source), spendCredits(userId, amount, purpose), transferCredits(fromUser, toUser, amount), getTransactionHistory(userId). In-ecosystem currency.
Create src/index.ts barrel exporting all services, types, and schemas
Create src/__tests__/monetization-engine.test.ts testing recordTip, recordIAP, recordAdRevenue, recordRemixRoyalty, getEarnings
Create src/__tests__/payout-service.test.ts testing requestPayout, processPayout, calculateAvailableBalance
Create src/__tests__/tier-service.test.ts testing getTier, upgradeTier, checkEligibility
Create src/__tests__/brand-partnerships.test.ts testing createListing, matchCreators, proposeDeal flow
Create src/__tests__/quant-credits.test.ts testing earnCredits, spendCredits, transferCredits, balance checks
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/creator-economy passes with no errors
pnpm test --filter=@quant/creator-economy passes all tests (minimum 20 test cases across 5 test files)
Package exports MonetizationEngine, CreatorDashboardService, PayoutService, TierService, BrandPartnershipService, QuantCreditsService, RemixRoyaltyTracker, TaxReportingService
Monetization engine correctly calculates revenue splits and aggregates earnings by period
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/creator-economy
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/creator-economy
